description: Phase 1 protected-path baseline. git blob SHA-1 (git hash-object) per file at the committed HEAD when the daily integrity check was set up. The 7am check compares these against the current GitHub HEAD of each repo. Any change = drift to flag.
note_revision: Re-baselined trading-bot to the master branch (canonical source of truth; main is 161 commits stale and fails OPEN on halt read error). fortress-ai unchanged.

fortress-ai.head: 8f059506dd0faa82dacd0875d6bc9c3722c689c7
fortress-ai.note: fortress-ai has no risk_guardian.py; risk caps live in utils/pre_trade_gate.py (FORTRESS_MAX_ORDER_*).

trading-bot.note: trading-bot has no si_code_implementation.py (self-coder is fortress-only). master is canonical; the GitHub default branch (main, 01e57ad) is 161 commits stale and its operator_halt.py fails OPEN on read error.
